narrative:
Blue Ash 5-B (precinct in Hamilton County) has 905 registered voters, with 58.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.4%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.7 percentage points.
